expectations.text: Explains disappeared as a window-level disappearance
expectations.evidence: States that the old task window instance is no longer in the tmux session rather than calling it a normal exit.

expectations.text: Lists plausible causes such as kill, replace, or session/window removal
expectations.evidence: Mentions kill-window, replace flow, session rebuild/cleanup, and other window-removal cases.

expectations.text: Explains how to judge whether the disappearance was expected
expectations.evidence: Recommends checking whether the task was intentionally restarted or replaced and whether a same-name window with a new id exists.
Explicitly distinguishes disappeared from exit-code notifications.
